user.title: Heating Simulator Setup
user.description: Configure the simulator name, model type, and basic operating parameters.

data_description.external_temperature_entity: Leave blank to use the fixed value below.
data_description.external_temperature_fixed: Used when no external temperature entity is configured.
data_description.update_interval_seconds: How often the simulation advances. Lower values are more accurate but use more CPU.

model_simple.title: Simple (R1C1) Model Parameters
model_simple.description: Single-zone model with a direct electric heater. Set physical values, or leave calibration fields non-zero to back-calculate from observed behaviour.

data.calib_a: Calibration: heating rate a (°C/min) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_tau: Calibration: cooling time constant τ (minutes) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_b: Calibration: cooling rate b = 1/τ — leave 0 to skip

model_r2c2.title: R2C2 Model Parameters
model_r2c2.description: Two-node model with separate air and building fabric thermal masses. Includes solar gain.

data.calib_tau: Calibration: cooling time constant τ (minutes) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_b: Calibration: cooling rate b = 1/τ — leave 0 to skip

model_radiator.title: Wet Radiator Model Parameters
model_radiator.description: Single-zone model with a hot-water radiator. Heater power is determined by radiator and flow temperature parameters.

data.pipe_delay_seconds: Pipe dead-time — delay before hot water reaches radiator (seconds)
data.calib_a: Calibration: heating rate a (°C/min) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_tau: Calibration: cooling time constant τ (minutes) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_b: Calibration: cooling rate b = 1/τ — leave 0 to skip

model_r2c2_radiator.title: R2C2 + Radiator Model Parameters
model_r2c2_radiator.description: Two-node building model driven by a hot-water radiator. Combines R2C2 fabric physics with wet radiator heat delivery.

data.calib_a: Calibration: heating rate a (°C/min) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_tau: Calibration: cooling time constant τ (minutes) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_b: Calibration: cooling rate b = 1/τ — leave 0 to skip

general.title: General Settings
general.description: Control mode, external temperature source, and update rate.

data_description.external_temperature_entity: Leave blank to use the fixed value below.
data_description.update_interval_seconds: How often the simulation advances. Lower values are more accurate but use more CPU.

thermal_model.title: Thermal Model Parameters
thermal_model.description: Physical parameters for the current model type. To change the model type, remove and re-add the integration.

data.calib_a: Calibration: heating rate a (°C/min) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_tau: Calibration: cooling time constant τ (minutes) — leave 0 to skip
data.calib_b: Calibration: cooling rate b = 1/τ — leave 0 to skip

disturbances.title: Disturbances
disturbances.description: Simulated occupancy, weather, and external temperature profile effects. Set values to 0 / disabled to deactivate each disturbance.

data.occupancy_seed: Random seed (0 for different each run)

sensor.title: Sensor Degradation
sensor.description: Simulate imperfections in the temperature sensor output. Set all values to 0 to disable and report the true simulated temperature.

data.sensor_noise_std_dev: Noise standard deviation (°C) — Gaussian white noise
data.sensor_lag_tau: First-order lag time constant (seconds) — 0 to disable
data.sensor_update_rate_seconds: Sensor update interval (seconds) — 0 for every tick
